headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on AvalonBay Communities, Lowers Price Target to $203
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $206 to $203.
